data.description:
## Context
Post-mortem of epic a88f (LLM Workflow Engine) via two validation subagents: a
coverage audit (behavioral+contractual × hermetic+external) and a prior-art
comparison (GHA / Argo / Inspect / dotprompt / tarfile CVE). Several verified
defects + coverage gaps to address.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] #1 bare `if:` (no `${{ }}`) no longer silently always-true (lint rejects)
- [ ] #4 duplicate YAML keys rejected by the loader
- [ ] #19 tarfile data_filter guarded on Python < 3.11.4
- [ ] #20/#21 snapshot proc.wait after kill; sweep restores write bits; file-count cap
- [ ] #24 JUnit wrapped in `<testsuites>` with quoteattr + failure body
- [ ] #25 eval grader snapshot cross-checked against model id
- [ ] #30/#31 prompt front-matter survives CRLF/BOM
- [ ] #32 declared-optional prompt vars default to empty (match schema)
- [ ] #33 variant overlay unions required/variables (no base-var drop)
- [ ] #14/#15/#16 runner doc-vs-impl drift removed (include_raw/parsing_error/pairing)
- [ ] run_eval raises NotImplementedError (not EvalError) when harness unwired
- [ ] external: live workflow-run test under tests/external (marked external)
- [ ] contract: CLI run/status/result `--output json` validates vs workflow_run schema
- [ ] golden: workflow.v1.schema.json + code_review.yaml frozen
- [ ] all new/changed paths covered by hermetic tests; full suite green
data.title: Post-epic hardening: workflow engine prior-art gotchas + coverage gaps
